description: isometric tall volcanic cliff tiles, obsidian and lava rock face only: 1) obsidian cliff 2) glowing-crack cliff 3) basalt columns 4) ashen cliff 5) ember cliff 6) lava cliff corner

geometry.note: screen_x=ox+(col-row)*grid_dx; screen_y=oy+(col+row)*grid_dy; raise one level by subtracting level_height from screen_y; draw back-to-front by (col+row) then by level.

stacking.formula: face_px = depth_ratio*(tile_height-26). One elevation level = 38px (a 64x64 @ 100% tile). To place a tile N levels up, subtract N*38 from screen_y. This set's face spans `layers` levels. Stack flush by offsetting the upper tile up by its own face_height_px. Draw back-to-front by (col+row), then level.

request.description: isometric tall volcanic cliff tiles, obsidian and lava rock face only: 1) obsidian cliff 2) glowing-crack cliff 3) basalt columns 4) ashen cliff 5) ember cliff 6) lava cliff corner
